name: Jagoda Janiszewska
focus: Grant and project coordination • Research budgeting • Mission support
bio: Jagoda Janiszewska is a Grant and Project Coordinator at Northern Arizona University’s Radiant Center for Remote Sensing, where she supports large-scale scientific research initiatives in planetary science and Earth observation. In her role, she contributes to the development of research grant proposals, manages project budgets, and helps coordinate interdisciplinary teams working on advanced remote sensing and space science missions. She is actively involved in supporting NASA- and international mission-related work, including contributing to instrument operations, data processing, and project management for the Emirates Mars Mission. Janiszewska plays a key role in ensuring the efficiency and success of complex research programs by bridging administrative, financial, and scientific efforts, helping researchers execute high-impact projects in planetary exploration and environmental monitoring.
